skills.summary: Discover Lua scripts across builtin/temp/user, prefer reusing existing scripts, and map listed relative paths to read_file paths.
Create and update Lua scripts through cap_lua, preferring existing scripts first and using builtin as references with temp/user for iteration.
Run Lua scripts from builtin/temp/user sync or async, preferring existing scripts before creating new ones, and manage background Lua jobs.
Reusable Lua patterns for scripts that run through cap_lua.
